versions.version_description: My first time to make one
Based off the album version, Slash chords included, Chords synced with the Lyrics or underscores(beats) (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wg92RrNhB8s).

This arrangement was made with a more jazz way. It is not that difficult to play the chords, but you need to know at least the basics of how to play. In addition, it is necessary to use a capo on the first fret.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
CAPO ON 6
STANDARD TUNING
BPM 126 (ALLEGRO)

UPDATE: I've added OPTIONAL riffs between "( )".  ALL THE NOTES INSIDE THEM ARE STRUMED LITERALLY
ONLY ONCE VERY QUICK AND YOU DON'T LET THEM RING AT ALL.
[ch]D[/ch] = xx0232
[ch]Dsus4[/ch] = xx0233
[ch]Asus4[/ch] = x02230
[ch]A[/ch] = x02220


[INTRO]

Play the next riff, I tabbed it in different ways.
It also appears throughout the song.

[tab]         WITH CAPO ON 6TH                        CAPO ON 6TH. VERSION 2
e|-----0-2-----3-2-------------------|        e|-----------------------------------|
B|---3-------3-----0----0---0-3-2----|        B|---3-5-7---3-8-7-0----0---0-3-2----|
G|--------------------2---2----------|        G|--------------------2---2----------|
D|-----------------------------------|        D|-----------------------------------|
A|-----------------------------------|        A|-----------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------|        E|-----------------------------------|[/tab]

[tab]           WITHOUT CAPO                           WITHOUT CAPO VERSION 2 
e|--4-6-8---4-9-8--------------------|        e|---4-6-8---4-9-8-------------------|
B|----------------6---4-6--4-6-9-8---|        B|-----------------6----6---6-9-8----|
G|-----------------------------------|        G|---------------------8---8---------|
D|-----------------------------------|        D|-----------------------------------|
A|-----------------------------------|        A|-----------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------|        E|-----------------------------------|[/tab]


OR JUST STRUM:

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   
([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])
[ch]G[/ch]  
([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
 I was a liar[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]            ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])
I gave into the fire[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I know I should've fought it[/tab]
[tab]            ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
At least I'm being  honest[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
 Feel like a failure[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]            ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])
Cause I know that I failed you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I should've done you better[/tab]
[tab]               ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
Cause you don't want a liar[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])        [ch]G[/ch]             ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
She gives you everything but boy I couldn't give it to you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]))       [ch]G[/ch]               ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
That you got everything but I got nothing here without you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
So one last time[/tab]
[tab]([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]) [ch]G[/ch]                   ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 I need  to be the one who takes you    home[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
One more time[/tab]
[tab]([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]) [ch]G[/ch]                   ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 I promise  after that, I'll let you    go[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]               ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])
Baby I don't care if you got her in your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 All I really care is you wake up in my     arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
One last time[/tab]
[tab]([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])  [ch]G[/ch]                  ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 I need  to be the one who takes you    home[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
 I don't deserve it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])
I know I don't deserve it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
But stay with me a minute[/tab]
[tab]          ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
I'll swear I'll make it worth it[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
 Can't you forgive me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]              ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])
At least just temporarily[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I know that this is my fault[/tab]
[tab]             ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
I should have been more careful[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]          ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])        [ch]G[/ch]             ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
She gives you everything but boy I couldn't give it to you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]              ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])       [ch]G[/ch]               ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
That you got everything but I got nothing here without you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
So one last time[/tab]
[tab]([ch]D-[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]) [ch]G[/ch]                   ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 I need  to be the one who takes you    home[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
One more time[/tab]
[tab]([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]) [ch]G[/ch]                   ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 I promise  after that, I'll let you    go[/tab]

Baby I don't care if you got her in your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
 All I really care is you wake up in my     arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
One last time[/tab]

 I need  to be the one who takes you    home[/tab]


[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dsus4[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch])


[Bridge]

[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I know I should've fought it[/tab]
[tab]            ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
At least I'm being  honest[/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] (D-Dsus4-D)
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
But stay with me a minute[/tab]
[tab]          ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
I'll swear I'll make it worth it[/tab]

[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]             ([ch]Asus4[/ch]) [ch]A[/ch]
Cause I don't want to be without you[/tab]

Baby I don't care if you got her in your heart[/tab]

One last time[/tab]
